queries.question: List all student emails, along with their field of study and degree program.
queries.sql: SELECT Email, Field_Of_Study, Degree_Program FROM Students
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/student#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/student/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?email ?field_of_study ?degree_program WHERE {
  ?students a :Students .
  ?students p:email ?email .
  ?students p:Field_Of_Study ?field_of_study .
  ?students p:Degree_Program ?degree_program .
}

queries.question: List students born after 1990, along with their field of study.
queries.sql: SELECT fullname, Field_Of_Study FROM Students WHERE CAST(SUBSTR(BirthDate, 1, 4) AS INT)  > '1990'

queries.question: List students born after 1990, along with their field of study and degree program.
queries.sql: SELECT fullname, Field_Of_Study, Degree_Program FROM Students WHERE CAST(SUBSTR(BirthDate, 1, 4) AS INT)  > '1990'

ambiguous_dsl.question: List all student emails and indicate what they are studying.
List all the students that are born after 1990 and what they study.
